text: <par>The relationship between the apparent Hayu doublet, <latinform>-pɪ</latinform> and <latinform>-(m)be</latinform>, is not clear.</par>
<par>Division? M1: add LUNG to 1387 gloss? M2: <latinform>ti</latinform> also 1387?</par>
<par>This appears to be the only form in this source with a tone mark. Form changed from <latinform>le 22s</latinform> to <latinform>le²²ˢ</latinform> on 29 Nov 2011.</par>
